Moz Pro

Trusted SEO toolset known for Domain Authority and link metrics

7/10Overall Rating
7/10Ease of Use
$99/moStarting Price
2004Founded

About Moz Pro

Moz Pro is a ai seo & marketing platform founded in 2004. It positions itself as “Trusted SEO toolset known for Domain Authority and link metrics” and is best suited for SEO professionals, agencies, link builders. Pricing starts at $99/mo.

Features

FeatureAvailable
Keyword ResearchYes
Rank TrackingYes
Site AuditYes
Backlink AnalysisYes
Content OptimizationYes
Competitor AnalysisYes
Ai WritingNo
Serp AnalysisYes
ReportingYes
Api AccessYes

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • Invented Domain Authority—trusted metric
  • Excellent learning resources and community
  • Solid all-around SEO features

Cons

  • Smaller link index than Ahrefs
  • Innovation has slowed
  • Pricing feels high for the features
